subtasks.description: Retrieve all active billing contracts with contracted annual values from contract management system
Query invoicing database for all invoices issued in 2024, grouped by contract, to calculate actual annual value per contract
Reconcile contracted annual values against actual 2024 invoiced amounts, calculate variance percentage, and flag contracts with >10% variance for review

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks minimum required: (1) mongo_query (small) retrieves active contracts from document store; (2) sql_gen (small) aggregates 2024 invoice data—both are straightforward single-query lookups with explicit filters. (3) cross_recon (mid) reconciles two distinct sources (contract state vs. invoice ledger), calculates variance, and flags exceptions—mid-tier handles multi-signal reconciliation and decision logic across two datasets. No policy_action needed: flagging material variance is analytical, not governance approval. No multitool_plan: only two system queries plus reconciliation.

output.sql: SELECT contract_id, vendor_name, COUNT(*) as invoice_count, SUM(amount_usd) as total_invoiced_2024, ROUND(SUM(amount_usd), 2) as actual_annual_value_2024 FROM invoice_facts WHERE invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' AND invoice_date < '2025-01-01' AND status IN ('paid', 'pending', 'issued') GROUP BY contract_id, vendor_name ORDER BY total_invoiced_2024 DESC
